## Description

What skill does this add or fix? Summarise the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `docs/contributors/quality-bar.md` and `docs/contributors/security-guardrails.md`.
- [ ] Frontmatter is valid — `npm run validate` passes.
- [ ] Assigned the correct `risk:` tag (`none`, `safe`, `critical`, `offensive`, or `unknown`).
- [ ] "When to use" section is clear and specific.
- [ ] `## Limitations` section (or equivalent) present.
- [ ] Offensive skill includes the "Authorized Use Only" disclaimer.
- [ ] SKILL.md command/network/token changes ran `npm run security:docs`.
- [ ] `skill-review` GitHub Action result checked — no actionable feedback.
- [ ] Manual logic review done (not just automated checks).
- [ ] Verified the skill works locally.
- [ ] Source-Only PR — no generated registry artifacts (`CATALOG.md`, `skills_index.json`, `data/*.json`).
- [ ] Credits added in `README.md` if applicable.
- [ ] `license:` and `license_source:` declared for external `source_repo`.
- [ ] **Allow edits from maintainers** enabled.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
